plugins.name: social-deep-dive
plugins.author: newbiehackler
plugins.description: Deep social media profiling — extracts bios, follower counts, post frequency, and cross-platform identity links from 15+ platforms.

plugins.name: breach-check
plugins.author: newbiehackler
plugins.description: Check if an email or username appears in known data breaches. Queries multiple breach databases and returns exposure details.

plugins.name: geolocation-osint
plugins.author: newbiehackler
plugins.description: Extract and analyze geolocation data from photos, social media posts, and IP addresses. Maps digital footprints to physical locations.
